from __future__ import annotations
import json
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from typing import Any

READINESS_LEVEL='STUB_RUNNABLE'

def build_trace()->dict[str,Any]:
    trace_id='bem1284-local-stub-trace'
    return {'trace_id':trace_id,'runner':'minimal_governance_loop_runner','readiness_level':READINESS_LEVEL,'status':'stub_runnable','release_pass':False,'events':[{'step':1,'role':'GD_CURATOR','event':'input_received'},{'step':2,'role':'ANALYST','event':'proposal_prepared'},{'step':3,'role':'AUDITOR','event':'proposal_under_audit'},{'step':4,'role':'EXECUTOR','event':'execution_stubbed'},{'step':5,'role':'AUDITOR','event':'result_under_audit'}],'timestamp_utc':datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),'notes':['KZ-1 restores runnable skeleton only.','Not FUNCTIONAL proof.','Not Gate 2 PASS.']}

def main()->int:
    print(json.dumps(build_trace(),ensure_ascii=False,sort_keys=True))
    return 0

if __name__=='__main__':
    raise SystemExit(main())

Create file tests/governance/test_kz1_minimal_runner_skeleton.py with content import json
import subprocess
import sys
from pathlib import Path


def test_minimal_governance_loop_runner_stub_runs():
    path=Path('governance/runners/minimal_governance_loop_runner.py')
    assert path.exists()
    result=subprocess.run([sys.executable,str(path)],capture_output=True,text=True,check=True)
    payload=json.loads(result.stdout)
    assert payload['readiness_level']=='STUB_RUNNABLE'
    assert payload['release_pass'] is False
    assert payload['status']=='stub_runnable'
    assert payload['events']
